mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id AND ur.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 AND (u.username = 'admin' OR r.data_scope = 1) LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM biz_project WHERE is_deleted = 0
